canonical_name: Elementary linear cellular automata: Rule 90 / Rule 150
formula_or_rule: 1D binary CA. Rule 90: s_i(t+1)=s_{i-1}(t) XOR s_{i+1}(t). Rule 150: s_i(t+1)=s_{i-1}(t) XOR s_i(t) XOR s_{i+1}(t). Render time downward from a single seed or random seed.
expected_visual_signature: Sierpinski-triangle/XOR lace, nested triangular voids, crisp self-similar scanlines.
primary_citations: Self-similarity of linear cellular automata, DOI 10.1016/0022-0000(92)90007-6; Statistical mechanics of cellular automata, DOI 10.1103/revmodphys.55.601
distinct_from_existing: Catalog has Wolfram Rule 30 and Wireworld; no deterministic linear Rule 90/150 XOR fractal entry found.

formula_or_rule: Two-field water/biomass PDE: plant u_t = u^2 w - B u + diffusion; water w_t = A - w - u^2 w + downhill advection + D_w diffusion. Use explicit finite-difference texture ping-pong.
parameter_defaults: A=2.0; B=0.45; waterDiffusion=10; plantDiffusion=1; advection=0.2; dt=0.02; stepsPerFrame=4
expected_visual_signature: Banded tiger-bush stripes, arcs, gaps, and desert-to-pattern transitions.
primary_citations: Pattern solutions of the Klausmeier Model for banded vegetation in semi-arid environments I, DOI 10.1088/0951-7715/23/10/016; Regular and Irregular Patterns in Semiarid Vegetation, DOI 10.1126/science.284.5421.1826
distinct_from_existing: Catalog has Gray-Scott/Brusselator/Schnakenberg-style chemistry, not advective dryland vegetation bands.

formula_or_rule: Iterate a Lattès-family rational map, e.g. R(z)=((z^2+1)^2)/(4*z*(z^2-1)) with pole guards; color by escape/pole approach, derivative growth, or Fatou/Julia boundary distance.
expected_visual_signature: Highly symmetric rational Julia web on the Riemann sphere with dense preimage structure and pole-centered filaments.
primary_citations: Lattès maps and the interior of the bifurcation locus, DOI 10.3934/jmd.2019014; Frontiers in complex dynamics, DOI 10.1090/s0273-0979-1994-00519-1
distinct_from_existing: Catalog has polynomial/rational_map basics and Weierstrass p; no named Lattès rational-map module found.

formula_or_rule: n-state cyclic CA: state s advances to (s+1) mod n if at least threshold neighbors are already in next state; otherwise unchanged. Moore or hex neighborhoods.
expected_visual_signature: Color-cycling spiral waves, targets, rotating arms, excitable-media turbulence.
primary_citations: Spiral Waves in a Cyclic Cellular Automaton Model for Excitable Media, DOI 10.1142/s0217984997001572; Cyclic Cellular Automata in Two Dimensions, DOI 10.1007/978-1-4612-0451-0_8
distinct_from_existing: Catalog has Wireworld/turmites/life-like entries; no cyclic excitable-media CA found.

formula_or_rule: Three-phase excitable CA: resting cell becomes excited if neighbor excitation count exceeds threshold; excited becomes refractory; refractory decays to resting after refractoryPeriod.
expected_visual_signature: Cardiac-like wavefronts, target waves, broken spirals, refractory trails.
primary_citations: The Time Evolution of a Greenberg–Hastings Cellular Automaton on a Finite Graph, DOI 10.25088/complexsystems.27.2.101; Excitable Greenberg-Hastings cellular automaton model on scale-free networks, DOI 10.1103/physreve.75.032901
distinct_from_existing: Distinct from Wireworld because it is a generic excitable-wave CA with refractory dynamics, not circuit conduction rules.

formula_or_rule: Use Arnoux-Rauzy substitutions on a 3-letter alphabet, e.g. sigma_1: 1->1,2->21,3->31 and cyclic variants; render prefix-walk projected tiles / boundary.
expected_visual_signature: Asymmetric Rauzy-like compact tiles with fractal boundaries and three-color stepped-surface domains.
primary_citations: Connectedness of fractals associated with Arnoux-Rauzy substitutions, DOI 10.1051/ita/2014008; Self-affine tiling via substitution dynamical systems and Rauzy fractals, DOI 10.2140/pjm.2002.206.465
distinct_from_existing: Catalog has Rauzy/Tribonacci-related entries; Arnoux-Rauzy substitutions are a distinct named family and should be added only with identity text to avoid aliasing.

formula_or_rule: Start from a Pisot substitution matrix; apply dual substitution on faces/edges in projected contracting space; render inflated prototile boundaries by subdivision depth.
expected_visual_signature: Patchwork self-affine tiles with fractal edges, not simple rhombic/kite Penrose-style tiles.
primary_citations: Fractal dual substitution tilings, DOI 10.4171/jfg/37; Unimodular Pisot substitutions and their associated tiles, DOI 10.5802/jtnb.556
distinct_from_existing: Catalog includes named tilings and Rauzy, but not a general dual-substitution fractal tile renderer.

formula_or_rule: Expose a paper-defined parameterized iterative method for f(z)=z^n-1; at each pixel iterate z_{k+1}=Phi_alpha(z_k,f,f',...) and color by converged root and iteration count.
expected_visual_signature: Newton-like basins whose lobe boundaries morph continuously as alpha changes.
primary_citations: Parametric Family of Root-Finding Iterative Methods: Fractals of the Basins of Attraction, DOI 10.3390/fractalfract6100572; Higher-Order Root-Finding Algorithms and Their Basins of Attraction, DOI 10.1155/2020/5070363
distinct_from_existing: Catalog has many named single root-finders; this adds a continuous academically cited parameter family rather than another fixed method.

formula_or_rule: Alternate or blend two structurally different root-finding maps Phi_A and Phi_B for a polynomial; render basins by final root and convergence speed.
expected_visual_signature: Hybrid basin boundaries, islands, and symmetry breaks not seen in either source method alone.
primary_citations: Fractal patterns from the dynamics of combined polynomial root finding methods, DOI 10.1007/s11071-017-3813-6
distinct_from_existing: Distinct if implemented as an explicit hybrid/alternating dynamics module, not as duplicate Newton/Halley presets.

formula_or_rule: Use a finite set of contraction similitudes/affine maps that form a tiling attractor; render by chaos game, deterministic subdivision, or address-space coloring.
expected_visual_signature: Plane-filling clusters of self-similar tiles with recursive cracks and boundaries.
primary_citations: Fractal Tilings from Iterated Function Systems, DOI 10.1007/s00454-014-9589-2; Construction of fractal objects with iterated function systems, DOI 10.1145/325334.325245
distinct_from_existing: Catalog has individual IFS fractals; this would add tiling-specific IFS address coloring and tile boundaries.

formula_or_rule: Two-species activator-inhibitor PDE tuned to self-replicating spot regime; implement as ping-pong texture update and preset distinct from Gray-Scott if kinetics differ.
parameter_defaults: model=paper_spot_kinetics; dt=0.2; diffusion_u=paper_default; diffusion_v=paper_default; feed/kill or kinetic params from cited model
expected_visual_signature: Spot splitting, spot replication cascades, moving gaps and lattices.
primary_citations: Experimental observation of self-replicating spots in a reaction-diffusion system, DOI 10.1038/369215a0; Reaction-Diffusion Model as a Framework for Understanding Biological Pattern Formation, DOI 10.1126/science.1179047
distinct_from_existing: Catalog already has Gray-Scott self-replicating spots; admit only if kinetics/source identity differ, otherwise keep as citation-backed preset/documentation.
